mapper.select: select order_id, order_no, user_id, region_id, total_amount, pay_amount, status, payment_method, transaction_id, remark, admin_note, tracking_no, paid_at, shipped_at, completed_at, closed_at, expires_at, create_time, update_time from bh_order where order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update:
update bh_order
status = #{request.status},
tracking_no = #{request.trackingNo},
admin_note = #{request.adminNote},
shipped_at = now(),
completed_at = now(),
closed_at = now(),
update_time = now()
where order_id = #{orderId}
update bh_order set status = 'closed', closed_at = now(), update_time = now() where status = 'pending_pay' and expires_at is not null and expires_at < now()
update bh_order set status = 'completed', completed_at = now(), update_time = now() where status = 'shipped' and shipped_at is not null and shipped_at < date_sub(now(), interval 15 day)
mapper.insert: insert into bh_order (order_no, user_id, region_id, total_amount, pay_amount, status, expires_at, create_time, update_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{regionId}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{status}, #{expiresAt}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select order_id, order_no, user_id, region_id, total_amount, pay_amount, status, expires_at, create_time, update_time from bh_order where user_id = #{userId} order by order_id desc
mapper.update:
update bh_order set status = #{status},
paid_at = now(),
closed_at = now(),
update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId}
